name: LookPilot
short_description: Look around in games by moving your head - just like in real life. Only a webcam is required. One-click setup and seamless compatibility across many games.
detailed_description:
LookPilot lets you look around in games using only your head and/or eyes, making flight, racing, trucking, space, and FPS titles more immersive while giving you better control and situational awareness. All you need is a webcam.

Setup is quick: install, start tracking, launch your game. Most supported games recognize LookPilot immediately. Everything runs fully on-device with low CPU usage, works even with lower-quality webcams, and supports Windows and Linux.

How It Works

LookPilot tracks head rotation and translation (yaw, pitch, roll + X/Y/Z) and optional eye rotation, then blends them into a final camera output according to your settings. Output is sent to games through standard head-tracking interfaces (TrackIR emulation / virtual joystick), so no plugins or hardware clips are required.

LookPilot Demo

Not sure if LookPilot is the right app for you? Try all features free for 14 days with the free trial!

Key Features

6DoF Tracking: Head yaw, pitch, roll, plus forward/back, left/right, up/down translation.

Eye Tracking: Get additional control just by moving your eyes.

High-Rate Output: Responsive output at high refresh rates for smooth camera control, even from low-FPS webcams.

Quick Start: Install → Start tracking → Launch the game. Most titles work instantly; some need a one-time in-game toggle.

Low Overhead: Runs easily on CPU. No dedicated hardware or GPU required.

Cross-Platform: Windows and Linux support.

Wide Compatibility: Works with 700+ games via standard head-tracking interfaces.

Virtual Joystick: Control a virtual joystick with your head/eye movements for wider compatibility and enhanced control.

Presets: Save your own tracking presets for different games or conditions. Use community presets created by power users and share your own.

Keybinds: Recenter, toggle tracking, and switch presets on the fly.

Setup in Three Steps

1. Install & Launch: Open LookPilot and start tracking.

2. Start Your Game: Most games detect tracking automatically; if needed, enable head-tracking in the game’s options once (see the game guides for exact steps).

3. Fine-Tune (Optional): Adjust sensitivity, smoothing, deadzones, mapping, and eye influence to taste.

Customization & Presets

Protocols: Choose the communication interface (TrackIR emulation / joystick emulation).

Head Tracking Settings: Toggle axes; set input→output mapping per axis; tune sensitivity, smoothing, deadzones, and confidence threshold.

Eye Tracking Settings: Per-axis mapping and smoothing controls.

Blend Control: Adjust how much eye tracking influences the final output.

TrueView Toggle: Choose translation relative to mapped/output rotation or the real rotation.

Presets: Create unlimited presets, switch with keybinds, and share with others.

Popular Supported Games

Flight Simulation

War Thunder

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2020

Microsoft Flight Simulator X: Steam Edition

Top Gun: Maverick Expansion

Tacview

IL-2 Sturmovik: Great Battles

IL-2 Sturmovik: Battle of Stalingrad

DCS World

DCS World Steam Edition

X-Plane 12

X-Plane 11

Project Wingman

AeroFly FS2

Space Simulation

Star Citizen

Elite Dangerous

Orbiter

EVERSPACE

EVERSPACE 2

Star Wars: Squadrons

Kerbal Space Program

Racing

Assetto Corsa

Assetto Corsa Competizione

rFactor 2

F1 2024

F1 2023

F1 2022

iRacing

Dirt 5

Project CARS 3

Automobilista 2

Driving Simulation

BeamNG.drive

Euro Truck Simulator 2

American Truck Simulator

Farming Simulator 25

Farming Simulator 22

Bus Simulator 21 Next Stop

18 Wheels of Steel: Extreme Trucker

18 Wheels of Steel: American Long Haul

Rail Transport

Train Simulator Classic 2024

FPS

Arma 3

DayZ

Game support grows over time. If your favorite title uses standard head-tracking interfaces, there’s a good chance it already works. Join the community and let us know what you’d like to see next.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Arabic*, Czech*, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
